text: I feel a mix of curiosity and grounding as I walk through this space. The clean, modern architecture and the vibrant colors of the R+D display suggest a place focused on innovation and thoughtful inquiry. Being surrounded by ideas and the visible invitation to explore the intersection of human and machine intelligence makes me reflect on our relationship with technology. There is a quiet excitement in the air, as if every detail is asking me to pause, ponder, and engage with bigger questions about progress and coexistence.
